weather_line: Northeast wind freshening · brass ducks rotating slowly · glow reported in Diagon Alley, then not

stories.headline: Briefcase Opened Under Accord Terms; Room Illuminated; Contents Satisfy All Present; No One Has Described Them
body: The matter of the glowing briefcase — logged Unattended (Luminous) at Ministry security eleven-oh-three Friday evening, traced to the back room of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, and the subject of a formal Gringotts consultation under Statute 7 of the Luminous Unattended Items Accord — was resolved Tuesday morning at nine forty-one, when the briefcase was opened.

Christine was present, as required by the Accord's corrected third sub-clause — the irregularity she had identified Monday having been formally acknowledged and incorporated into the proceedings by a goblin who did not thank her but did use her wording. The room was illuminated. The two Ministry investigators who had previously visited and declined to report were present again, and declined to report again, though their expressions were noticeably different. The man in the suit arrived at nine thirty-eight, collected what was his, nodded once at Christine in a manner described by witnesses as 'extremely motivated and marginally grateful,' and left.

Gringotts has filed the consultation as Statute 7 Procedure: Concluded (Irregular Sub-Clause, Resolved). The commendation portrait in the Accounts Liaison Wing corridor — third pillar left, Anomalous (Positive), Precedent: Pending — has been joined, as of this morning, by a second small brass plaque reading 'See Also: Briefcase (Luminous), July.' Christine passed it on the way out and said nothing, which the duty goblin is choosing to interpret as approval.

stories.headline: Northeast by Nightfall: A Name Has Been Spoken Aloud; Steve Confirms It Is the One He Had in Mind
body: A development in the northeast orientation situation, now in its second day: the name was spoken Tuesday morning, over the kitchen table, by Christine, who had located a notation in the margin of the November Hempworth chart's reverse side — a pencilled word, in a different hand than the cartographer's, that resolved the question of where the Jeep is pointing.

Steve confirmed this was the one he had in mind. He did not say when he had written it there. The brass ducks on the shelf remain facing southwest, which is where they have been, but one has been moved a quarter-turn toward the centre of the shelf — a development this correspondent considers material. The Jeep has not moved. The name has been spoken. These are not the same thing as a departure date, but they are adjacent to one.

stories.headline: Household Biscuit Inventory Undergoes Formal Audit Following Overnight Anomaly; Findings Consistent With Previous Findings; Lucy Unavailable for Comment
body: A shortage — precise quantity under review — was confirmed Tuesday morning after the household biscuit inventory was audited in response to an overnight anomaly described in the incident log as 'crumb distribution inconsistent with gravitational cause.' The audit found the inventory reduced. The audit did not find evidence. These are the same results as the previous four audits.

Lucy was located in the southeast corner of the sitting room, engaged in what she has described, through a spokesperson, as 'resting.' Ellie was found in the hallway, apparently having forgotten she had been walking somewhere. Jersey was on the warmest available lap and has offered a full alibi, which is that he was on the warmest available lap. The case remains open. The crumbs do not.

stories.headline: Ministry Confirms Tuesday Is Occurring; Notes That This Information Was Available Yesterday; Attaches No Map This Time, Which Is Itself Suspicious
body: The Ministry of Magic issued its Tuesday bulletin at eight fifteen, confirming the day was occurring and characterising conditions as 'current.' The bulletin did not attach a map — a departure from Monday's practice that several observers noted immediately, and which the Ministry has declined to address, citing 'cartographic discretion.'

The bulletin made no reference to the briefcase, the man in the suit, or the Accord. It did include, in a footnote, the phrase 'matters previously described as developing may be considered, where applicable, developed,' which the Ministry has since confirmed was not about anything in particular.

familiars_corner: Lucy: Available all morning to answer questions about the biscuit audit; was not asked any; considers this a satisfactory outcome and has moved on.

Ellie: Spent a productive portion of Tuesday morning reintroducing herself to the garden, which she approached with the enthusiasm of someone visiting for the first time, which, for Ellie, is how every visit to the garden goes.
Jersey: The warmest lap was located, assessed, and occupied by seven fifty-two; has since issued no further statements and requires none.
founding_editor_note: That second plaque they put up — the brass one, next to the commendation — I'd have used a spirit level. I'm not saying it's crooked. I'm saying I'd have used a level. — D.

in_brief.sport: Tuesday deadlift record stands; the briefcase was, by all accounts, heavy, and Christine was present, which this desk considers relevant.
in_brief.forecast: Northeast winds at undisclosed strength · name spoken, direction confirmed · ducks adjusting · departure not yet named but closer than it was yesterday.

storyline_updates.title: The Briefcase Returns
storyline_updates.summary: Resolved Tuesday morning under Accord terms, corrected sub-clause, Christine present. Contents illuminated the room, satisfied all observers, were not described. Man in suit collected his property and departed. Second brass plaque installed in the Liaison Wing corridor. Arc closed with full honours.

storyline_updates.title: Northeast by Nightfall
storyline_updates.summary: Day 2: The name was spoken aloud by Christine, found in a pencilled marginal notation on the reverse of the Hempworth chart, in a hand that may be Steve's. Steve confirmed it was the name he had in mind. One brass duck has shifted a quarter-turn toward the shelf centre. The Jeep has not moved. No departure date. Day 3 should bring the first material planning step — either the chart is unfolded properly, a route is traced, or the brass ducks complete their turn and something is decided.
